description: May's condition worsens at Radcliffe’s lab. She experiences hallucinations and resists help. Radcliffe proposes a radical, risky plan: to temporarily kill May to 'reboot' her brain and save her from certain death. Simmons and Radcliffe reluctantly move forward with this dangerous attempt, knowing time is running out fast.
location: Dr. Holden Radcliffe's house (New York / Radcliffe lab)

transcript.line: No, let... Stay away from me!
